strongestSubmetric.label: Learning and mastery windows
strongestSubmetric.read: 20/20 persona checks pass; progression ordering is not fully preserved.

weakestSubmetric.label: Long-run non-repetition
weakestSubmetric.read: Aurora has a stage-family blueprint and evidence windows, but no automated stage-signature similarity penalty yet.

nextRecommendedWork: build a stage-signature distance harness across early, challenge, mid-run, and late-run windows
implement one challenge-stage movement and reward slice with clear perfect/near-perfect feedback
add one later-level entry or escort variation family and measure pressure without unfair collapse

submetrics.label: Stage distinctiveness
submetrics.read: 6/6 stage families are blueprinted and 4/6 target evidence windows are present; implementation is still early.

submetrics.label: Challenge-stage identity
submetrics.read: 5/5 challenge timing checks pass and 3/3 content layers are blueprinted; distinctive playable challenge content is still limited.

submetrics.label: Movement grammar expansion
submetrics.read: Later-level entry, escort, regrouping, and challenge-path grammar is planned, but not yet measured by a stage-signature distance harness.

submetrics.label: Pressure curve over time
submetrics.read: 3/3 source pressure/loss windows are found, but 0 reproduce as exact losses under replay.

submetrics.label: Boss and reward opportunity design
submetrics.read: 3/3 capture/rescue scenarios match, but boss-entry and bonus-opportunity learning windows need direct long-run measurements.

submetrics.label: Learning and mastery windows
submetrics.read: 20/20 persona checks pass; progression ordering is not fully preserved.

submetrics.label: Long-run non-repetition
submetrics.read: Aurora has a stage-family blueprint and evidence windows, but no automated stage-signature similarity penalty yet.
